title: Shehbaz-Pezeshkian 45-min call reaffirms regional peace; Sharif-Trump relay calls
snippet: PM Shehbaz Sharif held 45-min call with Iran President Pezeshkian reaffirming Pakistan's commitment to regional peace. Then relay call with Trump. PM appreciated Iran's 'constructive conversations' with FM Munir during Tehran visit. Pakistan ready for multi-day talks. Islamabad venue secured, roads blocked, preparations complete.
tag_reason: 신규 — 샤리프-페제시키안 45분 통화 및 트럼프 릴레이 통화는 4/20 신규 사건. 파키스탄 셔틀 외교의 최신 진전.
